description_long: This is an adult woman standing upright, dressed in a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a deep V-neckline and a fitted waist. The dress has a halter-style top with a tie or fastening at the back of the neck, and the back is mostly open, exposing the shoulders and upper back. She is wearing high-heeled shoes, which add to her height and formal appearance. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is straight and composed. Her hair is styled in a neat, low bun at the back of her head, giving a polished and professional look. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman stands upright in a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a halter neckline and high-heeled shoes, her hair styled in a low bun.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep V-neckline, sleeveless design, and fitted waist of the dress, with arms relaxed at her sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight posture, the dress's side profile, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back of the dress, halter neck tie, and the low bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the dress's side profile and the woman's upright stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length halter dress with a deep V-neckline and fitted waist
